summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of AI-Powered Urban Drone Emergency Response System. All core backend APIs working perfectly. Frontend loads correctly with emergency theme and all key features functional.

ui_bugs.issue: Location permission denied error shown (expected browser behavior)

passed_tests: API Root Status - GET /api/ returns operational status
Health Check - GET /api/health returns healthy status
Drone Fleet API - GET /api/drones returns 5 drones with valid structure
Statistics API - GET /api/stats returns system statistics
Incidents API - GET /api/incidents returns incidents list
Report Incident API - POST /api/report-incident accepts multipart form data successfully
Landing page loads with emergency theme and navigation buttons
Report Incident page - all 5 incident type selection buttons clickable
Report Incident page - video upload functionality present
Dashboard shows 5 drone markers on map
Dashboard system status panel displays correctly
Dashboard drone fleet sidebar shows all 5 drones
Mobile responsive design with mobile menu
Submit button properly disabled without required fields
